colleges.description: Private deemed university in Lucknow with medical and engineering programs.

colleges.name: MVN University (Modern Vidya Niketan University)
colleges.description: Private university established in 2012 on NH-2 Delhi-Agra Highway, Palwal. Approved by UGC, BCI, PCI. 280+ recruiters. Top recruiters: HCL, IBM, TCS, Infosys, Hero Group, Cognizant. 28-acre green campus in Delhi NCR region.

colleges.name: NGF College of Engineering and Technology (NGFCET)
colleges.description: Private engineering college established in 2008 on 26-acre campus, NH-2 Palwal. Affiliated to JC Bose University, YMCA Faridabad. Approved by AICTE. Highest package 22 LPA. Corporate partners: Microsoft, TCS iON, Siemens, Texas Instruments. Award: Best Emerging Engineering College of Delhi-NCR — World Education Summit 2019.

colleges.name: Advanced Institute of Technology and Management (AITM Palwal)
colleges.description: Multi-faculty private institution established in 2006 on 25-acre campus, Delhi-Mathura Road, Palwal. Approved by AICTE, NCTE, PCI. Affiliated to JC Bose University & CRSU Jind. Offers engineering, pharmacy, education and nursing programs. Affordable fees with scholarship options for SC/ST/OBC students.

colleges.name: Shri Ram College of Engineering and Management (SRCEM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering college established in 2008 by Shree Gokulendra Educational Trust. Located at 70 KM Stone, NH-19, Palwal. Affiliated to JC Bose University YMCA Faridabad. Approved by AICTE. 13.5-acre campus. Average package 5 LPA. Scholarships under Beti Bachao Beti Padhao. 200+ students ranked top 15 in university.

colleges.name: Rattan Institute of Technology and Management (RITM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering and management college established in 2008. Located at 79 KM Stone, NH-2, Village Saveli, Teh-Hodal, Palwal. Affiliated to JC Bose University YMCA Faridabad. Approved by AICTE. 12.5-acre campus. 725+ students, 137 faculty. Offers diploma to postgraduate programs.

colleges.name: Satya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering college at 72 KM Stone, Delhi-Mathura Road, Village Mitrol, Teh Hodal, Palwal. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Approved by AICTE. Known for free technical education for 100 girls per year under 'Hamari Beti Hamari Shan' scheme. Faculty from IITs, NITs, IIMs. 100% placement track record with IBM, HCL, Google, Honeywell, Genpact.

colleges.name: Delhi College of Technology and Management (DCTM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering and management college in Palwal, Haryana. Established in 2008. Affiliated to JC Bose University YMCA Faridabad. Approved by AICTE. Offers B.Tech, MBA and diploma programs in engineering and management disciplines. Good campus infrastructure with hostel facilities.

colleges.name: Advanced College of Technology and Management (ACTM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering college at 70 KM Stone, Delhi-Mathura Road, VPO Aurangabad, Tehsil Hodal, Palwal. Established in 2006. Affiliated to JC Bose University. Approved by AICTE. Offers B.Tech in CSE, Mechanical, Civil and Electrical Engineering. 4 B.Tech programs with separate hostels for boys and girls.

colleges.name: B.S. Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management (BSAITM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private institution established in 2001. NBA accredited. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Approved by AICTE. Average package 5.5 LPA, highest 8 LPA. Top recruiters: Bosch, Hyundai, Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, IBM, Samsung, IndiaMart. IPA scholarships for meritorious students. 24×7 security campus.

colleges.name: AERP Institute of Technology and Management (Palwal)
colleges.description: Private polytechnic and engineering institute in Palwal. Approved by AICTE. Offers diploma programs in Automobile, Civil, Electrical, Electronics & Communication, and Mechanical Engineering along with B.Tech programs. Affordable fees with good practical training facilities.

colleges.name: Government Polytechnic Palwal
colleges.description: Government polytechnic institute in Palwal under Haryana Government. Affiliated to HSBTE Panchkula. Approved by AICTE. Offers 3-year diploma programs in engineering at very affordable government fee. Best option for students seeking practical technical education after Class 10.

colleges.name: Sehrawat College of Pharmacy (Palwal)
colleges.description: Private pharmacy college in VPO Hathin, Palwal. Approved by PCI and AICTE. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers D.Pharma (diploma), B.Pharma and M.Pharma programs. Good pharma industry placement in Delhi NCR and Haryana region.

colleges.name: Maa Omwati College of Education (Hassanpur Palwal)
colleges.description: Private teacher education institute in Hassanpur, Palwal. Part of Maa Omwati Education Trust. Approved by NCTE. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers B.Ed, M.Ed, D.Ed and B.P.Ed programs. Prepares teachers for school education across Haryana and Delhi NCR.

colleges.name: S.L.D. Girls College of Education (Palwal)
colleges.description: Private women's teacher education college in Chhaprola, Palwal. Approved by NCTE. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers B.Ed and D.Ed programs exclusively for women. Focuses on quality teacher training with modern pedagogy for school education.

colleges.name: Lala Ram Swaroop Institute of Technology (LRSIT Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering and management institute in Palwal. Approved by AICTE. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers B.Tech, diploma and management programs. Well-connected to Delhi-NCR via NH-2.

colleges.name: Government Veterinary College Palwal
colleges.description: Government veterinary college in Palwal affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers 5-year BVSc & AH and 2-year MVSc programs. Excellent for students seeking careers in animal care, dairy, poultry and livestock management. Government-funded with very affordable fees.

colleges.name: Nav Bharti College of Education (Palwal)
colleges.description: Private teacher education college in Palwal. Approved by NCTE. Affiliated to MDU Rohtak. Offers B.Ed and M.Ed programs. Dedicated to training future educators for school-level teaching across Haryana.

colleges.name: Haryana College of Technology and Management (HCTM Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering and management institute in Palwal. Approved by AICTE. Affiliated to JC Bose University Faridabad. Offers B.Tech and management programs. Good campus facilities with transport connectivity to Delhi-NCR.

colleges.name: Shri Balwant Institute of Technology (SBIT Palwal)
colleges.description: Private engineering college in Palwal. Approved by AICTE. Affiliated to JC Bose University YMCA Faridabad. Offers B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA and diploma courses. Hostel facilities available for outstation students. Good placement support.
